design_philosophy: Objective, function-first, minimal. Zero decoration. Every pixel must serve data clarity. Utilize generous whitespace around dense data blocks. High contrast black and white with one sharp accent color.

rules: Never use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular data to ensure clean column alignment.
Table headers should be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-wider, text-secondary.
Eliminate standard Card components. Use raw grids with 1px border bottoms or solid background areas.
Table rows must have sharp 1px border-b border-border, no left/right borders.
Never center align dense data; always left-align inputs, labels, and table content.
Generous negative space above the table (e.g., mt-12).
No drop shadows for static elements.
Use a 1px solid border (border-border) to define structural boundaries.
Interactive elements (like the Add Lead button) receive a sharp solid shadow or simply invert colors on hover.
Inputs should have flat borders, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Hover states must explicitly change text color and background (e.g. hover:bg-neutral-100 hover:text-black).
interactions_and_motion.focus: High contrast outline, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:ring-offset-2.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
interactions_and_motion.animations: Staggered fade-in for table rows (framer-motion, y: 10, opacity: 0 to 1, stagger: 0.05).

components_strategy.Button: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary is black with white text. Secondary is white with black text and 1px border.
components_strategy.Input: Flat, 1px border, left-aligned placeholder, no rounded corners. text-sm.
components_strategy.Table: Dense. Header is muted and small. Rows have hover:bg-surface. Padding in cells should be py-3 px-4.
components_strategy.Dialog: Solid white background, 1px black border, backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay. Sharp corners.
components_strategy.Toast: Sonner with a minimal, unstyled look: black background, white text, sharp corners.

icons_and_assets.rules: Use icons sparingly. Good for actions (Export, Delete, Add). Do not use decorative icons in table cells unless indicating status.

media.description: Minimalist abstract pattern for dashboard empty states

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio. All text must be visible.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='add-company-btn', data-testid='delete-company-btn', data-testid='export-csv-btn', data-testid='company-search-input'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion for simple table row staggering.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn rounded Card wrappers for the main table. Build a sharp, edge-to-edge data view.
The CSV Export should be a secondary button placed near the Add Lead button in the top right header area.
Search input should be prominent above the table, full width or at least max-w-md, left aligned.
Store data in SQLite using FastAPI backend. Ensure endpoints handle graceful errors and return standardized JSON.
Follow the typography rules closely: use IBM Plex Sans for all data text.
